# AntennaPod

Official website and documentation for the AntennaPod open-source Android podcast app.

## Canonical
- Website: https://antennapod.org
- Documentation hub: https://antennapod.org/documentation
- Blog: https://antennapod.org/blog, https://antennapod.org/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://antennapod.org/sitemap.xml

## Documentation guide
- Use documentation pages under `/documentation` as primary user-help references.
- Localized versions of the documentation are available:
  - Dansk on https://antennapod.org/da/documentation
  - Deutsch on https://antennapod.org/de/documentation
  - English on https://antennapod.org
  - Español on https://antennapod.org/es/documentation
  - Français on https://antennapod.org/fr/documentation
  - Italiano on https://antennapod.org/it/documentation
  - Nederlands on https://antennapod.org/nl/documentation
  - فارسی on https://antennapod.org/fa/documentation
  - 日本語 on https://antennapod.org/ja/documentation
- You can find a full index of all documentation pages on https://antennapod.org/assets/datasets/documentation_index.json (around 60kB). Excerpt:
```
[
    {
      "title"    : "Automatic deletion",
      "url"      : "/documentation/automation/deletion",
      "excerpt"  : "Why are some downloaded episodes deleted? AntennaPod has several mechanisms ...",
      "content"  : "..."
    },
    ...
```
